blockMeta.name: takt/cards-grid
blockMeta.title: Cards Grid
blockMeta.description: A responsive grid displaying multiple cards with optional images, titles, descriptions, and tertiary buttons with arrow icons

attributes.name: darkMode
attributes.description: Enable dark mode with charcoal background pseudo-element

attributes.name: columns
attributes.description: Grid columns (1, 2, or 3). Responsive: 1 on mobile, max 2 on tablet, attribute value on desktop

childBlockAttributes.name: image
childBlockAttributes.description: Card image with attachment ID and focal point

childBlockAttributes.name: description
childBlockAttributes.description: Card description text (allows bold and italic)

childBlockAttributes.name: button
childBlockAttributes.description: Tertiary button with link URL, title, and new tab toggle

otherPatterns: Dark mode with pseudo-element charcoal background
Tertiary button variation with arrow icon
Context passing for responsive column information
Flexbox stacking for image + content layout

existingDecisions: Dark mode uses transparent section background + pseudo-element charcoal cards
Card structure: stacked image wrapper + content wrapper, both with rounded-[25px]
Image has p-4 padding with bg-accent colored border
Uses tertiary button variation with arrow icon injection
Dark mode adds md:py-24 (96px) vertical spacing

projectRules.darkMode: Use transparent section background with pseudo-element charcoal cards

recentChanges.change: Cleanup: Removed redundant editorScript and render fields
Bug fix: Removed editorScript from CardsGridItem/block.json
